narrative:
Miami Twp township has 32,024 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
